calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Reserve
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for (administrator) Robert Willig.

Ms. Young reported that she has all of the receipts and will be filing them today. The status hearing on reserve was taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Reserve
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Continued To May-11-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for (administrator) Robert Willig.

Ms. Young reported that all funds have been distributed, that she has all receipts except 2 but expects them in this week and will file. The status hearing on reserve was continued to May 11, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Reserve
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for (executor) Faye Willig.

Ms. Young reported that the property tax bills were not received until February, that the taxes have been paid and that the distribution will be done within a month. The status hearing on reserve was continued to April 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Robert Willig (Administrator).

Ms. Young stated that she does not see a preliminary change of ownership while Faye (Decedent's Wife/Former Executor) was alive, that letters were recorded when Robert was appointed, that they sent a proposition 58 form as well as paper work for change of ownership, and that the City has been made aware of the sale and the debts. Ms. Young also stated that no one has received a supplemental appraisal or supplemental assessment, that with respect to the reserve of $115,000.00 there is a $280,000.00 capital gains on Al's half for which taxes will be about $40,000.00, that the property tax is unknown, that at this point the reserve is probably more than they need and that the Estate was sat on from 2001 through 2013. The Court stated that it does not know if it can approve fees paid while Faye was alive. The accounting petition/petition for final distribution was taken under submission. Status on distribution of the reserve was set for January 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Continued To Sep-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
